content.speakerText: I'll take him! Thanks so much for your help.
content.speakerTextCn: 我就要这只了！太感谢你的帮助了。

options.text: Awesome! Here’s your care guide—call us if you got any questions.
That’s fine, no need to thank me.
I’m busy now, just pay and leave.

content.explanation: 正确答案回应了顾客的感谢，并提供了后续支持（护理指南和联系方式），符合服务场景的礼貌与专业性。选项2虽然礼貌但缺乏主动支持；选项3否定感谢，显得生硬；选项4态度粗鲁，不符合服务场景。

content.speakerText: Thank you so much for helping me pick out the perfect gift!
content.speakerTextCn: 非常感谢你帮我挑选了完美的礼物！

options.text: You’re welcome! I’m glad you found something special.
Don’t mention it. I didn’t do anything.
Can I get your email for a survey?

content.explanation: 正确答案表达了真诚的回应，并肯定了顾客的满意，是地道的道别感谢回应。选项2态度冷漠；选项3过度贬低自己的帮助，不符合英语文化中积极回应感谢的习惯；选项4虽然常见于商业场景，但在此语境下显得突兀，未先回应情感。

content.speakerText: I really appreciate your patience and advice today.
content.speakerTextCn: 今天非常感谢你的耐心和建议。

options.text: It was my pleasure! Have a wonderful day with your new pet!
You should thank the manager instead.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了'It was my pleasure'这一高情商表达，并加入了温暖的祝福，符合道别场景的情感需求。选项2过于随意；选项3推卸责任，不合礼仪；选项4虽然语法正确，但语气消极，削弱了服务的温度。

content.template: Thanks so much! I'll definitely call if I have any questions. ________!
content.hint: 这是店员对顾客购买宠物后的典型祝福语
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达（祝福语：Enjoy your new...）

content.template: I really appreciate your help. ________ for everything!
content.hint: 在表达感谢后，常用这句话作为道别收尾
content.knowledgePoint: 感谢道别核心句型（Thank you for...）

content.hint: 表达‘好好照顾’新宠物的常用搭配
content.knowledgePoint: 动词短语搭配（take good care of）

content.speakerText: I'll take him! Thanks so much for your help.
content.speakerTextCn: 我就要这只了！太感谢你的帮助了。
expectedAnswers: Awesome! Here’s your care guide—call us if you have any questions.
You’re so welcome! Enjoy your new furry friend!
My pleasure! Don’t hesitate to reach out if you need advice.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了感谢并提供后续支持
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当，无中式英语
表达自然度：语气友好、符合服务场景，有温度

content.speakerText: Thank you for helping me find the perfect gift. I really appreciate it!
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你帮我找到完美的礼物，我真的很感激！
expectedAnswers: You’re very welcome! I’m so happy you found something special.
It was my pleasure! Hope they love it as much as you do.
Thank you for saying that! Let me know if you need anything else.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否真诚回应感谢并表达关心
语言准确性：使用恰当的道别表达，无语法错误
表达自然度：语气温暖、符合英语母语者习惯，避免机械回应

content.speakerText: I’m so grateful for your patience and advice today.
content.speakerTextCn: 今天非常感谢你的耐心和建议。
expectedAnswers: It was truly my pleasure—I’m glad I could help!
Thank you for your kind words! Wishing you and your new pet lots of joy!
I really appreciate that! Please don’t hesitate to contact us anytime.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了深层感谢并强化客户关系
语言准确性：使用高级表达如 'truly my pleasure', 'don’t hesitate to contact'
表达自然度：情感真挚，有服务专业感，避免模板化回应
